0010001000110011 1011010001011000 1 -> sum: 1101011010001100, cout: 0
1001001010111001 0101111000110011 1 -> sum: 1111000011101101, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
